title: Settings page, project selector, detail panel fix, catch-all API proxy
changes: Settings page: /settings with change password, API key display, sessions, account info
Project selector: API-based project list replaces filesystem discovery
Detail panel close: panelClosed flag prevents reopen on poll refresh
Catch-all API proxy: all /api/* and /a2a/* forwarded to API with auth
Login redesign: light theme, XPollination branding, responsive images
LITE_FIELDS: pdsa_ref, changelog_ref, abstract_ref, liaison Q&A fields
Default filter: active pipeline only, excludes complete/cancelled/blocked
Agent bar: reads from A2A agents API with stations fallback
Google OAuth: Sign in with Google button, SameSite=lax cookie fix
Logout button + Settings link in header
Apple touch icon + manifest on login/register pages
